title: DB Schenker India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: DB Schenker India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
DB Schenker India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Chennai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DB Schenker India:
DB Schenker India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DB Schenker India!
